summary: I've spent 15 years helping developers succeed on platforms most people only read about in press releases. At GoPro, I built the Developer Program from zero to 330 partner companies, including NASA, Google, BMW, and Jaguar Land Rover, managing a team of 10 engineers to make it happen. At BMW, I led the application integration program that brought Audible, Pandora, and other household names into the connected car. At HERE Technologies, I onboarded 15,000 developers during a global pandemic and grew a cloud marketplace's addressable market by 2,250x. Most recently at 1Password, I established the company's developer relations vision across open and closed source, led cross-functional GTM, and served as chief developer advocate and content producer. My work sits at the intersection of developer experience, technical product strategy, and community building. I hold a BS in Computer Science from the University of Portland, where I was an Entrepreneur Scholar. I'm also certified in Prompt Engineering through Dr. Elvis Savaria's program (Facebook Llama Project).

career_timeline.role: Sr. Product Manager, Cloud Marketplace Platform

technical_focus: GenAI/ML: RAG Implementation, Prompt Engineering, OpenAI APIs
Platforms: API/SDK Product Management, Developer Experience (DX)
Metrics: Developer Adoption, Time-to-Integration, Platform Growth

differentiators.title: Zero-to-One DevRel Builder
differentiators.description: Three times I've built developer relations programs from scratch at companies that had never had one: BMW, GoPro, and 1Password. I know how to make the case internally, hire the team, define the metrics, and ship results before anyone loses patience.

differentiators.title: Enterprise Partnership DNA
differentiators.description: My developer programs haven't just attracted hobbyists. I've built ecosystems that brought in NASA, Google, BMW, Jaguar Land Rover, JPL, and Hot Wheels. I understand how to design programs that serve both indie builders and Fortune 500 engineering teams.

differentiators.title: 2,250x Market Growth
differentiators.description: At HERE Technologies, I took a cloud API marketplace from a narrow segment to a 2,250x expansion of its serviceable obtainable market. That's what happens when developer experience strategy meets product management rigor.

differentiators.title: 15,000 Developers Onboarded During a Pandemic
differentiators.description: When COVID shut down every conference and meetup in 2020, I pivoted HERE's developer relations to fully digital, onboarding 15,000 developers and generating 100+ media articles through tutorials, video content, and community engagement.

differentiators.title: AI-Native Practitioner
differentiators.description: I've built RAG-based tutorial generation pipelines, custom social monitoring tools for Bluesky and Mastodon, and I hold a Prompt Engineering certification from the team behind Facebook's Llama project. I bring hands-on GenAI fluency to everything I do.

differentiators.title: Content at Scale
differentiators.description: Across my career, I've produced and directed 123+ developer tutorial videos, written technical documentation, and served as the on-camera advocate for multiple brands. I understand the full pipeline from scripting to shooting to distribution.
